<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Preview linked dataset content"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/datasets/{datasetId}/v/{version}/preview"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches a partial preview of the content for a linked dataset version.

  as={"h2"}
